kept.text:
In my opinion @HyperliquidX HIP-4 isn't really competing with Polymarket or Kalshi.

The mechanics are built for something else.

➥ Binary contracts that settle to 0 or 1 can't carry leverage
➥ So HIP-4 ships fully collateralized by design

That's the same shape that insurance, hedges, credit default swaps and parametric protection have always needed. Leverage breaks all of them and it runs on the same execution engine as Hyperliquid's perps and spot. 

Prediction markets are speculation. HIP-4 quietly opens the door to protection to categories that has never had onchain infrastructure at scale.

h/t to @Decentralisedco for the image

kept.text:
我们从链上数据分析一下预测市场的格局变化：

首先，预测市场赛道4月份名义交易量为298亿，相比3月份增长了12.5%，整个赛道依旧在高速增长。

但是，Polymarket 的交易量下跌了14.8%。

为什么 Polymarket 的交易量不增反降了呢？

主要有三个原因：

1️⃣ Kalshi 已连续多月拉大领先优势，进一步挤压了Polymarket的市场份额。

2️⃣ Polymarket 在3月30日全面收取手续费，平台日收入快速冲上百万美元级别，因此4月交易量下滑但收入增长。

3️⃣ Polymarket 在4月28日进行技术架构大升级（CTF Exchange V2），短暂暂停交易并清空订单簿，这对交易量也产生了影响。

另外，值得关注的是，Predictfun 在4月份的交易量增幅高达368.2%，是所有预测平台中增长最快的。 @predictdotfun 

最主要的原因是 Predictfun 集成到了币安APP后，交易量和TVL都有了一个阶梯式的增长。

币安作为 Crypto 行业最大的流量入口和流动性中心，预测市场服务还在逐步开放不同的国家区域，因此增长势能并未完全释放。

Predictfun 产品本身也在快速迭代，正在发展为币安生态的基础设施，并占据了亚太地区的市场注意力。

除了Polymarket和Kalshi，Predictfun是否会稳居预测市场的第三大平台呢？

我们可以持续关注预测市场的格局变化。

原始数据来自于： @datadashboards

profile_bio.description:
1️⃣ 现 @predictdotfun 亚太区负责人
2️⃣ 前币安钱包产品经理 
3️⃣ 前阿里巴巴产品经理 
4️⃣ 本硕博计算机专业

quoted_tweet.text:
币圈的内容生态已经发生了很大变化。

当用户开始吐槽一些KOL没干货、割韭菜，项目方们也发现很多KOL不能带量，此时，另一批人正越来越被重视，也就是KOC！

KOC（Key Opinion Consumer），即关键意见消费者。

他们本质是真实用户，在垂直小圈子里有几百到几千粉丝，主要活跃在私域或者项目社区。

他们靠亲身使用体验做分享，内容实用、接地气，信任度高。

如果说KOL可以造势，KOC则可以种草。

如果说KOL可以让更多人看见，KOC则让看见的人下单。

Predictfun 的大使计划，面向的是3千粉到1万粉之间的小博主，其实就是想去筛选KOC！

从我们的申请门槛就可以看到，需要已有一定的项目积分来证明是 Predictfun 的深度玩家，而不仅仅看粉丝数和流量。

即使你现在没有粉丝，只要你在社区中活跃或者有自己的社区，有意愿进行内容创作，都可以来申请。

我们非常愿意扶持一批 Predictfun 的深度用户成为KOC和KOL！

选择一个足够优质、足够有潜力的项目做大使，是新人博主自我成长最好的选择！

欢迎加入Predictfun！@predictdotfun

profile_bio.description: Pushing the limits of decentralization/ Telling the stories behind Onchain data, and Narratives/ ||RWAs||

quoted_tweet.text:
The first live test of HIP-4 is officially in the wild, and it’s a perfect case study in sentiment.

@HyperliquidX launched HIP-4 which introduces binary outcome contracts directly inside the same environment where traders already run spot and perpetuals.

Prediction markets have mostly existed as standalone products.
Yes it's useful, but it's also disconnected from the rest of a trader’s workflow.

With HIP-4, prediction contracts sit beside spot and perps under the same unified margin system.

A trader can hold a $BTC perp position, spot exposure, and a $BTC outcome contract all in one account, with the same collateral; It automatically turns prediction markets into a trading primitive.

Now this makes a lot of sense because once outcome contracts become native instruments instead of standalone products, their use cases expand.

Here are some of its features:

>> Hedging around major CPI releases.
>> Positioning around Fed decisions.
>> Managing event risk around token unlocks.
>> Building vault strategies around discrete outcomes.

Hyperliquid is launching this from a position of strength.
Hyperliquid on its own already has:

>> Active traders.
>> Market makers.
>> APIs.
>> Collateral sitting on platform.
>> One of the strongest onchain trading communities today.

So HIP-4 can as well be seen as plugging a new instrument into an already active trading engine.

When it comes to the fee structure, here's what they're working with. 

>> Zero fees to open positions.
>> No leverage. 
>> No liquidation risk. 
>> Known max loss upfront.

That lowers the barrier for traders who want event exposure without the operational complexity of leveraged products.

HIP-3 expanded Hyperliquid beyond crypto perps into builder deployed markets like stocks, commodities, and pre IPO contracts.

HIP-4 now adds event driven markets.
At this point, Hyperliquid is practically assembling a full spectrum Onchain market infrastructure layer.

​The market is currently pricing a 68% probability that $BTC stays above $78,663 as at yesterday. 
While perp funding is looking relatively neutral, the outcome Market is leaning bullish.

Here’s why I’m watching, and why I think you should too:

​>> The Divergence: 
When the prediction market that's fully collateralized, and has smart money starts pricing a move that the perp market leveraged retail hasn't caught yet, that's your lead indicator.

>> $HYPE Momentum: 
$HYPE is already up nearly 20% this month, sitting at over $9.7B market cap. 
The market is starting to price in the platform expansion rather than just the DEX volume; It's also trading at $40

​>> Liquidity Migration: 
Watch for volume moving from isolated prediction apps to Hyperliquid this week. 
With zero fees to open, the arbitrageurs are going to have a field day.

If Onchain exchanges eventually absorb multiple market categories into one unified execution venue, HIP-4 is definitely another step in that direction.
